auto-renewal-tip.android:
Continuous monthly subscriptions will be automatically deducted the day before the service expires. 
If you need to cancel the continuous monthly subscription service, please cancel in "Settings-Google Account" before each month expires.
auto-renewal-tip.ios: The subscription will automatically renew unless you turn off it in your iTunes account settings at least 24 hours before the current period ends,. You can manage your subscription and turn off the auto-renewal by visiting your iTunes account settings. Once the purchase is confirmed, your iTunes account will be charged.

introduce-page.card1-desc: The video footage is uploaded to the cloud in real-time 24 hours a day, allowing for instant playback. Recording is available without the need for a physical storage card, eliminating concerns about theft, loss, or damage to the device. Playback of recorded footage is available upon login, ensuring that the video recordings are never lost.
introduce-page.card1-label: Real-time uploading to the cloud. Recording is available without installing a physical storage card.
introduce-page.card2-desc: Support viewing recorded footage stored in the cloud even when the device is offline. Provide financial-grade backup of video data to prevent loss due to device failure or damage, ensuring playback of recordings in all circumstances.
introduce-page.card2-label: Can be viewed even without internet connection
introduce-page.card3-desc: Upload video recordings to the cloudd, where they undergo financial-grade encryption for the protection of your privacy against unauthorized access by other software. When switching devices, logging in automatically synchronizes the cloud data, providing both security and convenience in managing your information. This setup helps avoid data loss or privacy breaches due to SD card loss or theft.
introduce-page.card4-desc: The video recording playback function supports multiple playback speeds, allowing for quick browsing of a day's video playback without missing any information, making viewing video playback more efficient.

renewal-desc.android-item1: Payment: After payment, it's added to your Google account.
renewal-desc.android-item2: Cancel Renewal: Please turn off auto-renewal in Google settings at least 24 hours before current subscription ends.
renewal-desc.android-item3: Renewal: Google account will be charged 24 hours prior to expiration, extending for another period after successful payment.
renewal-desc.ios-item1: Payment: After payment, it's added to your iTunes account.
renewal-desc.ios-item2: Cancel Renewal: Please turn off auto-renewal in App Store/Apple ID settings at least 24 hours before current subscription ends.
renewal-desc.ios-item3: Renewal: iTunes account will be charged 24 hours prior to expiration, extending for another period after successful payment.

select-pkg-tip: Please select the package you want to purchase
state-change-fail: Cloud storage service status switching failed
state-close-tip: After closing, no new cloud videos will be generated, and the validity period of the package will not be extended.
